violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base have an accumulation of, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

One chicken sandwich was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sandwich was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of soil residue, and the fan mounted above it has an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
The facility is lacking a 3 bay sink. There is currently a 2 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and mold. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023
